languages.text: "По моим сведениям, орудия наведены по координатам главного штаба".
"To my knowledge, the guns are pointed at the coordinates of the main headquarters."
languages.original_text: "По моим сведениям, орудия наведены по координатам главного штаба".

traits.locale_text: "To my knowledge, the guns are pointed at the coordinates of the main headquarters."
"To my knowledge, the guns are pointed at the coordinates of the main headquarters."
"To my knowledge, the guns are pointed at the coordinates of the main headquarters."

languages.text: «Hasta donde sé, las armas apuntan a las coordenadas del cuartel general».
languages.original_text: "To my knowledge, the guns are pointed at the coordinates of the main headquarters."

traits.locale_text: «Hasta donde sé, las armas apuntan a las coordenadas del cuartel general».

languages.text: “据我所知，火炮瞄准的是总部的坐标。”
languages.original_text: "To my knowledge, the guns are pointed at the coordinates of the main headquarters."

traits.locale_text: “据我所知，火炮瞄准的是总部的坐标。”

languages.text: « À ma connaissance, les canons sont braqués sur les coordonnées du quartier général. »
languages.original_text: "To my knowledge, the guns are pointed at the coordinates of the main headquarters."

traits.locale_text: « À ma connaissance, les canons sont braqués sur les coordonnées du quartier général. »

languages.text: "Bildiğim kadarıyla silahlar, ana karargâhın koordinatlarına yöneltilmiş durumda."
languages.original_text: "To my knowledge, the guns are pointed at the coordinates of the main headquarters."

traits.locale_text: "Bildiğim kadarıyla silahlar, ana karargâhın koordinatlarına yöneltilmiş durumda."

languages.text: "Meines Wissens sind die Geschütze auf die Koordinaten des Hauptquartiers gerichtet."
languages.original_text: "To my knowledge, the guns are pointed at the coordinates of the main headquarters."

traits.locale_text: "Meines Wissens sind die Geschütze auf die Koordinaten des Hauptquartiers gerichtet."

languages.text: 「私の知る限り、その銃は本部の座標に向けている」
languages.original_text: "To my knowledge, the guns are pointed at the coordinates of the main headquarters."

traits.locale_text: 「私の知る限り、その銃は本部の座標に向けている」
